commands.notes: Requires .NET SDK 11.0.100-preview.5.26227.104; bootstrap by running ./build.sh first

frameworks.TestFramework.UnitTests: internal TestContainer framework (any public parameterless method = test) + AwesomeAssertions
frameworks.Microsoft.Testing.Platform.UnitTests: MSTest ([TestClass]/[TestMethod]) + MSTest Assert (AwesomeAssertions BANNED per BannedSymbols.txt)

testing_notes.service_provider: Use concrete ServiceProvider class (not Mock<IServiceProvider>) — GetRequiredServiceInternal<T> casts internally. AddService(obj) for registration.
testing_notes.implicit_usings: Enabled in all projects — System, System.Linq, System.Globalization etc. auto-included
testing_notes.experimental_attribute: IGracefulStopTestExecutionCapability has [Experimental("TPEXP")] — use #pragma warning disable TPEXP
testing_notes.configureawait: CA2007 is a warning — always add .ConfigureAwait(false) to awaited calls in test projects

repo_constraints: No VB.NET tests for analyzer projects

backlog.title: Unit tests for MaxFailedTestsCommandLineOptionsProvider
backlog.notes: PR created 2026-06-10. Tests cover invalid args, capability checks, GetCommandLineOptions.

backlog.title: Unit tests for TelemetryCollector
backlog.notes: Static state makes deterministic testing difficult. Needs investigation.

backlog.title: C# edge case tests for analyzer projects
backlog.notes: Good overall coverage already. Could add boundary cases.

completed.summary: Added 9 unit tests for MaxFailedTestsCommandLineOptionsProvider validation logic
